conflict: Commercial producers demand apolitical romance while the council demands coded ideological messaging.
consequence: Ina's compromise script is approved and Ji-eun is locked into a politically loaded role.
must_land_beats: Writers-room argument establishes market pressure against overt politics.
Ina embeds separation grief into a sibling subplot and lullaby motif.
Ji-eun asks directly whether she is being used as a political instrument.
The aired cut pleases no faction fully, increasing scrutiny on Ina.
objective: Deliver a pilot rewrite that can carry reunification sentiment through commercial television.
